what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a design-source image asset named vt-property/p-2; it stores YAML frontmatter metadata plus a one-line label identifying the file as source design ground-truth.
observations: Ledger entry for an image/jpeg asset in the design-source channel
Width and height are both recorded as 0
Author session id is ch-3mpkjg3r with a created timestamp
Body text calls the item 'SOURCE design ground-truth — vt-property/p-2.jpg'
standouts: Declared as design ground-truth source material
Image dimensions are unset despite being an image record
Uses a blob URI for content addressing
conventions: YAML frontmatter ledger schema with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, and provenance fields
Image ledger files live under channel-memory/images/
concerns: w and h are 0, which is unusual for an image record and suggests incomplete metadata extraction
No links or contextual references to related design artifacts
The 'ground-truth' claim is not substantiated by any in-file evidence
notes: A sparse provenance stub for a design-source image that declares itself ground truth but lacks dimensions and relationships.
questions: What visual content does vt-property/p-2.jpg actually depict?
Why are the image width and height recorded as zero?
What criteria make this file a 'design ground-truth'?
How is this image referenced or used by other design or code artifacts?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as a source design ground-truth image record matches the metadata, but the zero dimensions and empty links mean it functions more as an incomplete provenance stub than a fully described image asset.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a canonical, traceable design-source image asset for vt-property/p-2, anchored to an author session and creation time.
contribution: Provides a stable, content-addressed metadata record that links a design-source image to an author session and creation timestamp, serving as a provenance stub in a fused asset ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger record for the design-source JPEG image vt-property/p-2 with YAML metadata, a blob reference, zero dimensions, and a self-described 'SOURCE design ground-truth' label.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and provide provenance for a design-source image asset treated as ground truth.
